title: norantea guianensis subsp. japurensis
intro: Norantea guianensis subsp. japurensis, also known as the Guianan norantea, is a plant species in the family Rubiaceae. It is used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, treating respiratory issues, and aiding in the management of hypertension. Herbal preparations of Norantea guianensis subsp. japurensis often involve making teas, infusions, or decoctions from its leaves, which are typically consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
